body.title: ticket skill — /ticket quick-capture
body.result: /ticket skill written at ~/.claude/skills/ticket/SKILL.md — parses description from args, infers title/size/priority/tags, generates kebab ID, adds to queue via cc_queue.py add, posts to channel. Quick-capture only — no sprint expansion.
body.description: New /ticket skill: user types a description, it goes to cc_queue as a pending ticket with a deferred-discussion note. Quick capture without context switch. Chat about scope/priority next time we look at tickets.
